Solution to issue cannot be found in the documentation.

- [X] I checked the documentation.

### Issue

I used to use anaconda, miniconda, and have had mamba installed on them as well. I was able to choose the mamba forge kernels within vs code in the top right corner in any jupyter notebook.

I also have installed mambaforge 4.12.0-3 on a windows laptop last year and I can delete and create conda environments and can see them.

However, I just installed the latest mambaforge 22.9 on another windows computer but I can only see the base environment, I cant see any of the others I have created. I even tried downgrading to 4.12 but I can't see them.

What should I be doing to fix this?
